description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright on a rectangular base. The figure has an elongated body and a distinct headpiece or crown with pointed extensions, reminiscent of ancient Egyptian or African art. The surface appears weathered, with a patina suggesting it is made of aged bronze or a similar metal. The figure's arms are close to the body, and the overall form is slender and abstracted, lacking detailed facial features. The base is solid and dark, providing stability and contrast to the greenish hue of the figure. The sculpture exudes a sense of timelessness and solemnity, making it suitable for public display in an urban environment.
description: A slender, abstract human figure with a pointed headpiece stands on a dark rectangular base, featuring a weathered greenish patina. The sculpture has a minimalist, ancient-inspired design with smooth, aged surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full frontal outline of the figure, highlighting the pointed headpiece and the symmetrical, elongated body.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the thin profile of the sculpture and the protrusion of the headpiece, emphasizing the figure's abstract, flattened form.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the figure and the headpiece, with the base and the figure's shoulders clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the slim profile and the angular headpiece, with subtle surface texture visible.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure with pointed headpiece
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor plaza, park, or urban sidewalk.
